item.title: Colliding Wind Binaries
item.description: Governing Equations ¶ $$\eta = \frac{\dot{\text{M}}_{\text{OB}} v^\infty_\text{OB}}{\dot{\text{M}}_{\text{WR}} v^\infty_\text{WR}},$$ $$r_\text{WR} = \frac{1}{1+\eta^{1/2}} d_\text{sep} ~ , ~~~ r_\text{OB} = \frac{\eta^{1/2}}{1+\eta^{1/2}} d_\text{sep},$$ $$\theta_c = 2.1 \left( 1 - \frac{\eta^{2/5}}{4}\right) \eta^{-1/3} , $$ for $10^{-4} \leq \eta \leq 1$, Your browser does not support the video tag. Density profile of the Wind Collision Region of a WR+OB CWB system Important systems ¶ System Period (d) $e$ $\text{M}_{\text{WR}}$ ($\text{M}_\odot$) $M_{\text{OB}}$ ($\text{M}_\odot$) Periastron (AU) Apastron (AU) WR98a 556 ~ 0 10.

item.title: Hello There
item.description: Test ¶ Test 2 ¶ This is a test! This has an inline equation here: $x^2$ This is a standard equation: $$\int^\infty_0{\frac{x^2}{4\pi}}$$ These Are Bullet Points This Is An Ordered List More tests ¶ 1 2 # This is a code block code="here" This is a block quote, Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry.

item.title: Snow Day 2021
item.description: Snow caked trees by the train tracks The Tetley Stadium, draped in snow A place affectionately called murder alley Wide shot of the houses Woodhouse ridge

item.title: Yorkshire Dales
item.description: Lonely shed Stunning views of the Dales from the top of a hill Barnstorming Ruins
